summary: Classified 10 open PR inventory items independently within the shard scope. Five validator-identified security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security with non-mutating route_security actions; the remaining five PRs are kept independent. No close, merge, or fix actions were planned because this is plan mode and artifact permissions disable low-signal closeout, merge, and fix PRs.
